suggestions.topic: Hegotá EIP proposals: return deposits for distinct credentials and custom suite thresholds
suggestions.rationale: Explicitly deferred from ACDC #178 to 'next ACDC' (this call). These proposals need discussion to determine CFI/DFI status for Hegotá.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet-4 status and alpha-8 spec release
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-4 was targeting EOW after ACDC #178 (mid-May). Status check needed on ETH/70, ETH/71, gas limit changes, dual-deadline PRs, and builder deposit handling. Alpha-8 spec release was flagged as urgent for devnet targeting.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8025 (optional execution proofs / zkEVM) CFI/DFI decision for Hegotá
suggestions.rationale: Presented in ACDC #178 as a Hegotá candidate with existing Lighthouse and Prysm implementations. Teams were asked to review updated EIP PR #11604 and provide feedback. Decision needed on inclusion.

suggestions.topic: Committee attestation broadcast spec (ethp2p #5) CFI/DFI decision for Hegotá
suggestions.rationale: Sukun presented batched signature aggregation and gossip overhead reduction targeting 4x committee size increase for 8-slot epochs in ACDC #178. Proposed for Hegotá but no decision recorded.

Two competing proposals (Barnabas REST-only vs Marius full refactor) discussed in ACDC #178. Nethermind shipped Barnabas with 5-10x speedup. Decision deferred to ACDE/ACDT, but ACDC should confirm status and coordinate with EL discussions.

suggestions.topic: 4788 impact analysis for Lido, Rocketpool, EigenLayer
suggestions.rationale: Action item from ACDC #176 (March 19) for stokes to contact protocols about gaps in 4788 with empty payloads under ePBS. No follow-up reported in three subsequent meetings. May have been completed async or deprioritized.
ACDC #177 noted proposal window opened after EL headliner decision, with end date TBD based on Glamsterdam progress. With DevNet-4 launching, timeline update may be warranted.
